chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Okay, pop quiz. What am I drawing?

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: I'm gonna make three predictions here.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Firstly, you think I'd draw a house. You'd be right.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Secondly, that it just came really easily to you, it was effortless.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And thirdly, you're thinking that I'm not much of an artist.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And you'd be right on all counts there.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: But how can we look at this set of geometric shapes and think,

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: oh, a house. If you live in a house, I bet it looks nothing like this.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Well, that ability to perform object identification that comes so easily to us

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: does not come so easily to a computer.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: But that is where we can apply something called convolutional neural networks to the problem.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Now, a convolutional neural network, or a CNN,

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: is an area of deep learning that specializes in pattern recognition.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: My name is Martin Keane, and I work in the IBM garage at IBM.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Now, let's take a look at how CNN works at a high level.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Well, let's break it down. CNN, convolutional neural network.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Well, let's start with the artificial neural network part.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: This is a standard network that consists of multiple layers that are interconnected.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And each layer receives some input, transforms that input to something else,

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: and passes it as output to the next layer. That's how neural networks work.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And CNN is a particular part of the neural network, or a section of layers.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Let's say it's these three layers here.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And within these layers, we have something called filters.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And it's the filters that perform the pattern recognition that CNN is so good at.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: So, let's apply this to our house example.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Now, if this house were an actual image, it would be a series of pixels, just like any image.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And if we zoom in on a particular part of this house, let's say we zoom in around here,

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: then we would get, well, the window.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And what we're saying here is that a window consists of some perfectly straight lines.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Almost perfectly straight lines.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: But you know, a window doesn't need to look like that.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: A window could equally look like this, and we would still say it was a window.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: The cool thing about CNN is that using filters,

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: CNN could also say that these two objects represent the same thing.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: The way they do that, then, is through the application of these filters.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: So let's take a look at how that works.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Now, a filter is basically just a three-by-three block.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And within that block, we can specify a pattern to look for.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: We could say, let's look for a pattern like this, a right angle in our image.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: So what we do is we take this filter, and it's a three-by-three block here.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: We will analyze the equivalent three-by-three block up here as well.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: So we'll look at, first of all, these first group of three-by-three pixels,

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: and we will see how close are they to the filter shape.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And we'll give that a numeric score.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Then we will move across one column to the right and look at the next three-by-three block of pixels

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: and score how close they are to the filter shape.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And we will continue to slide over or convolve over all of these pixel layers

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: until we have mapped every three-by-three block.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Now, that's just for one filter, but what that will give us is an array of numbers

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: that say how closely an image matches our filter.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: But we can add more filters.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: So we could add another three-by-three filter here, and perhaps this one looks for a shape like this.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And we could add a third filter here, and perhaps this looks for a different kind of right angle shape.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: If we take the numeric arrays from all of these filters and combine them together in a process called pooling,

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: then we have a much better understanding of what is contained within this series of pixels.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Now, that's just the first layer of the CNN.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And as we go deeper into the neural network, the filters become more abstract, or they can do more.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: So the second layer of filters perhaps can perform tasks like basic object recognition.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: So we could have filters here that might be able to recognize the presence of a window,

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: or the presence of a door, or the presence of a roof.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And as we go deeper into the CNN to the next layer, well, maybe these filters can perform even more abstract tasks,

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: like being able to determine whether we're looking at a house, or we're looking at an apartment,

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: or whether we're looking at a skyscraper.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: So you can see the application of these filters increases as we go through the network and can perform more and more tasks.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And that's a very high-level basic overview of what CNN is.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: It has a ton of business applications. Think of OCR, for example, for understanding handwritten documents.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Think of visual recognition and facial detection and visual search.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Think of medical imagery and looking at that and determining what is being shown in an imaging scan.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And even think of the fact that we can apply a CNN to perform object identification for badly drawn houses.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: If you have any questions, please drop us a line below.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: And if you want to see more videos like this in the future, please like and subscribe.

chunks.title: What are Convolutional Neural Networks (C
chunks.text: Thanks for watching.
